section_miscategorizations.text: Blood pressure is 130/90 in the morning and 150/100 in the evening when sitting.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These blood pressure values are explicitly reported as home readings by the patient in the Subjective section, not clinician-measured vitals obtained during the visit.

section_miscategorizations.text: She is experiencing side effects from the lisinopril.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence restates patient-reported symptoms (lethargy, headaches) as side effects rather than providing new diagnostic synthesis; it fits better as subjective symptom reporting.
